context: Tests whether Translation framework guidance preserves current availability and on-device behavior while handling errors.

checklist.name: Presentation availability
checklist.description: Identifies translationPresentation as available starting iOS 17.4 / macOS 14.4 and does not apply that availability to all Translation APIs.

checklist.name: Programmatic availability
checklist.description: Marks TranslationSession, translationTask, LanguageAvailability, and batch translation APIs as iOS 18+ / macOS 15+.

checklist.name: Strategy availability and behavior
checklist.description: Marks TranslationSession.Strategy or preferredStrategy as iOS 26.4+ / macOS 26.4+ and does not claim highFidelity sends text to a server.

checklist.name: Language availability
checklist.description: Uses LanguageAvailability status checks and handles .installed, .supported, and .unsupported before or around translation.

checklist.name: Throwing API handling
checklist.description: Wraps translate, translations(from:), prepareTranslation, and download/cancellation cases in do/catch or equivalent error handling.

checklist.name: Session lifecycle
checklist.description: Uses translationTask inside a SwiftUI view context and notes direct TranslationSession(installedSource:target:) outside SwiftUI requires installed languages.
